context: Tests whether the agent accurately handles SwiftUI VideoPlayer overlay interaction and narrowly scopes external playback settings.

checklist.name: Overlay interactivity
checklist.description: States that VideoPlayer videoOverlay is interactive.

checklist.name: Overlay event order
checklist.description: Explains the overlay sits below system playback controls and receives only unhandled events.

checklist.name: Allows external playback
checklist.description: States that AVPlayer.allowsExternalPlayback defaults to true and should be left enabled when AirPlay is desired.

checklist.name: External screen scope
checklist.description: Explains that usesExternalPlaybackWhileExternalScreenIsActive is for automatic external-screen mode, not a blanket AirPlay requirement.
